summary: Comprehensive testing of 'Perizia Sinistro' damage assessment module - Backend API (22/22 tests passed) and Frontend UI (all features verified). The module correctly creates perizie with auto-generated cost items based on damage type, calculates costs with markup formulas, supports recalculation, and generates PDF documents.

issues: React hydration warning: <span> inside <tbody> - minor DOM nesting issue from dynamic rendering, does not affect functionality

backend_api.POST /api/perizie/ create: PASS - Creates new perizia with auto-generated number PER-{year}/{seq}
backend_api.POST strutturale auto-cost: PASS - Generates 6 items (A.01 smontaggio, B.01 fornitura +20%, C.01 trasporto, D.01 installazione, E.01 oneri normativi, F.01 smaltimento)
backend_api.POST estetico auto-cost: PASS - Generates 3 items (A.01, B.01 carteggiatura, F.01)
backend_api.POST automatismi auto-cost: PASS - Generates 4 items (A.01, B.01 componenti, B.02 collaudo EN12453, F.01)
backend_api.GET /api/perizie/ list: PASS - Returns items and total with search filter support
backend_api.GET /api/perizie/{id}: PASS - Returns complete perizia with all fields
backend_api.PUT /api/perizie/{id}: PASS - Updates fields and recalculates total_perizia
backend_api.DELETE /api/perizie/{id}: PASS - Removes perizia and returns 404 on subsequent GET
backend_api.POST /api/perizie/{id}/recalc: PASS - Regenerates cost items from current data
backend_api.GET /api/perizie/{id}/pdf: PASS - Returns PDF with correct Content-Type and Content-Disposition
backend_api.404 for non-existent: PASS - All endpoints return 404 for invalid IDs

frontend_ui.PeriziaListPage loads: PASS - Shows title, search, table, empty state
frontend_ui.Sidebar nav item: PASS - 'Perizie Sinistro' with ShieldAlert icon visible and clickable
frontend_ui.Tipo Danno selector: PASS - 3 clickable cards (Strutturale EN 1090, Estetico, Automatismi EN 12453)
frontend_ui.Map component: PASS - OpenStreetMap tiles render correctly (Rome default)
frontend_ui.Address input: PASS - Via/Piazza input with search button
frontend_ui.Prezzo di Riferimento: PASS - Prezzo Originale + Maggiorazione % with calculated preview
frontend_ui.Moduli Danneggiati: PASS - Add/edit modules with lunghezza/altezza inputs
frontend_ui.Cost table editable: PASS - Cod, Descrizione, U.M., Q.ta, Prezzo inputs with delete buttons
frontend_ui.Ricalcola button: PASS - Triggers cost recalculation from server
frontend_ui.Total perizia display: PASS - Shows total in EUR at bottom of cost table
frontend_ui.Save creates perizia: PASS - Creates new perizia and navigates to /perizie/{id}
frontend_ui.PDF button: PASS - Visible after save, correct URL format
frontend_ui.Success toast: PASS - Shows 'Perizia PER-{number} creata' after save

critical_code_review_comments: calc_voci_costo() correctly implements all 3 damage type cost structures
fornitura calculation uses prezzo_ml * (1 + coeff/100) * total_ml formula correctly
trasporto logic: 180 EUR if ml≤2.5, 350 EUR if ml>2.5 - implemented correctly
Cost items are editable in frontend with real-time total recalculation
PDF service uses reportlab with professional formatting and proper Italian text
All interactive elements have data-testid attributes for testing
Minor React hydration warning (span in tbody) from dynamic rendering - cosmetic only, no functionality impact
seed_data_creation: Test perizie created and cleaned up during backend testing. One UI test perizia created: PER-2026/0001
context_for_next_testing_agent: Perizia Sinistro module fully tested. Key details: 1) POST /api/perizie/ auto-generates cost items based on tipo_danno (strutturale=6, estetico=3, automatismi=4). 2) Cost items use calc_voci_costo() with fornitura markup formula and trasporto threshold at 2.5ml. 3) Frontend has map (react-leaflet/OpenStreetMap), photo upload (max 5), editable cost table with Ricalcola button. 4) PDF generation works via reportlab. 5) AI photo analysis endpoint exists but requires real photos + EMERGENT_LLM_KEY - optional test. 6) Previous tests: DDT (iter_25), Fornitori (iter_26), DDT Convert (iter_27).
